EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The administrator {subject.account.name} failed to delete the user account {object.account.name} on the security host {datafield1}
The administrator {subject.account.name} failed to add the user account {object.account.name} on the security host {datafield1}
The administrator {subject.account.name} deleted the user account {object.account.name} on the security host {datafield1}
The administrator {subject.account.name} added the user account {object.account.name} on the security host {datafield1}
